name: create_net
short_description: Create nets in the current design
full_help:
create_net

Description: 
Create nets in the current design

Syntax: 
create_net  [-from <arg>] [-to <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <nets>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-from]     Starting bus index
  [-to]       Ending bus index
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <nets>      Names of nets to create

Categories: 
Netlist

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
